// reporters: Tier2ReporterDecl.java.txt#InternalLog.logInternal
package com.other;

// Same class and method name, different package (no import): the bare qualifier
// resolves to this file's own package (com.other), which is not the declared
// package - not a capture. Package is the identity, not the name alone.
class Tier2OtherPackage {
    void sameNameDifferentPackage() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            InternalLog.logInternal("boom", e);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
